text_raw: Stämm makes bioprocesses easy, scalable, sustainable and repeatable and offers advanced manufacturing, bioengineering and Bio AI solutions for biologics and cell therapies.
text_clean: Stamm develops continuous, automated biomanufacturing infrastructure and related bioengineering and AI tools for biologics and cell therapies.

text_raw: Beeflow is a biotechnology company that provides professional pollination services to farmers using proprietary technologies and pollination efficiency data analysis to maximize crop yield and fruit quality.
text_clean: Beeflow uses bee biology, plant science and data to improve pollination outcomes and increase crop yields and quality.

text_raw: Puna Bio develops seed treatment microbial inoculants based on extremophile bacteria from the Argentine Puna to improve crop performance and regenerate soils.
text_clean: Puna Bio develops extremophile-based agricultural biologicals and microbial inoculants for yield improvement and soil regeneration.

text_raw: Kilimo is a climate tech company focused on water security that works with companies and farmers to optimize agricultural water use and generate measurable volumetric water benefits.
text_clean: Kilimo is a water-focused ag and climate platform that links companies and farmers to improve irrigation efficiency and watershed outcomes.

text_raw: Michroma introduces novel natural colorants and combines bioinformatics, synthetic biology, precision fermentation, chemistry and data science to develop food ingredients.
text_clean: Michroma uses fungal synthetic biology and precision fermentation to create natural food color ingredients.

text_raw: DeepAgro develops AI solutions for selective spraying, sowing, monitoring and diagnostics to improve farmers' quality of life while preserving the environment.
text_clean: DeepAgro applies AI to agriculture for precision spraying, crop monitoring and more efficient use of agrochemicals.

text_raw: BioHeuris creates biotech tools that make weed control more efficient and crop production more profitable, working with seed companies, growers and researchers.
text_clean: BioHeuris develops biotech and gene-edited crop tools for smarter, more sustainable weed management.

text_raw: Tomorrow Foods develops integrated plant protein solutions and ingredients for the food industry to enable healthier and more sustainable food products.
text_clean: Tomorrow Foods is a B2B food ingredient company building plant protein systems for healthier and more sustainable foods.

text_raw: Bioeutectics designs natural deep eutectic systems that replace petrochemical solvents, improve industrial performance and open new product design possibilities across industries.
text_clean: Bioeutectics develops bio-based solvent systems that replace petrochemical solvents in industrial processes.
